1.seasonStats: 2025-26: 9 appearances, 390 minutes, 1 goal, 0 assists (5 starts). 2024-25: 25 appearances, 3 goals
1.clubStanding: Peripheral first-team player, limited game-time despite long-term contract
1.notes: 20-year-old left-footed midfielder/attacking midfielder with strong youth international pedigree. African champion (U-20 AFCON) and 2025 FIFA U-20 World Cup scorer. Market value €516.5K. Recently recovered from injury (non-serious). Agent Mike Makaab confirms European interest exists but no concrete bids or named clubs as of Mar 11, 2026. Contract runs through June 2028 with Kaizer Chiefs. Jersey #28. Currently focuses on CAF Confederation Cup while building first-team experience in PSL.

2.seasonStats: 21 matches, 4 goals for Asante Kotoko since arrival
2.notes: Dynamic central midfielder with strong second range shot. Market value €75,000 (Transfermarkt). Represented by Prosport International (South African agency, joined February 2026). In line for Ghana Black Stars call-up for friendlies vs Austria and Germany. Actively playing in Ghana Premier League as of March 2026. CEO Mike Makaab stated no formal club approaches received as of mid-February 2026.

3.seasonStats: Outstanding performances in Ghana Premier League 2025-26 campaign despite club's inconsistent results
3.clubStanding: Asante Kotoko facing disciplinary proceedings (GFA charges for alleged breaches following Mar 8, 2026 match vs Karela United)
3.notes: Elite shot-stopper attracting major continental interest. Joined Asante Kotoko July 2024 on 2-year deal. Recently earned Guinea squad call-up for friendly matches vs Togo and Benin (March 2026). Contract expires June 2026 — renewal status unknown. Experienced international with 2 Guinea caps. Transfer target for Kaizer Chiefs rejected by Kotoko in January 2026. Currently under GFA investigation for disciplinary breach. High-profile goalkeeper with demonstrated quality in Ghana Premier League.
3.note: Suspension directly impacts transfer value before June 2026 contract expiry

4.notes: Attacking midfielder/winger (25 years old, born Mthatha, Eastern Cape). Market value €250k. Agent: Prosport. Described as 'eight and a half winger' - intense player who wins duels, offers successful dribbles, strong pressing. Career path: Mamelodi Sundowns (academy) → Maritzburg United/Durban City → Tshakhuma Tsha Madzivhandila → Royal AM → Golden Arrows.
4.detail: Transfer deal sealed between Pirates and Golden Arrows; move to Gauteng confirmed

5.clubStanding: Targeting top-eight finish in 2025-26 PSL season
5.notes: Experienced South African manager in third spell with Golden Arrows. Previously co-head coach at Mamelodi Sundowns (2020-2022) where he won 2 Premiership titles and multiple cup competitions. Career highlights include MTN 8 victory (2009, 2021), Nedbank Cup (2021-22), and 2 Premiership titles (2020-21, 2021-22). Former schoolteacher from Umzimkhulu, KwaZulu-Natal. Currently managing youthful squad at Golden Arrows with focus on competitive PSL campaign.
5.detail: Updated from generic credibility loss to specific assessment by ex-Chiefs striker Biyela: loss eliminates coaching candidacy

6.seasonStats: 2025-26: 19 games, 3 goals, 2 assists, 411 passes, 1,172 minutes. Career: 106 games, 11 goals, 6 assists for Kaizer Chiefs
6.notes: Talented attacking midfielder with South African youth pedigree (2020 COSAFA U-17 champion). Joined Kaizer Chiefs at 18. Recently focused on improving finishing at specialist academy (Mar 2026). On standby for Bafana Bafana AFCON squad; priority appears to be 2026 World Cup selection. Historical European interest but no active transfer movements in Jan-Apr 2026 window.

7.seasonStats: 2025-26 Premiership: 3 goals, 0 assists, 922 minutes, avg FotMob rating 6.82, 2 yellow cards, 1 red card
7.notes: Dynamic all-round midfielder known as 'The Compass.' Primarily operates as defensive midfielder (No. 6) but can play box-to-box (No. 8). Combines physical strength, sharp tactical awareness, and increasingly dangerous attacking edge—evidenced by 3 goals this season. U23 captain for Ivory Coast national team. Age 19 with significant upside. Market value €100k. Agent: Royal Bridge. Joined Golden Arrows Sept 17, 2025 from military academy. Previously attracted interest from Portuguese clubs and French clubs (per Golden Arrows coach Manqoba Mngqithi, Sept 2025). Two official transfer offers already rejected by club in April 2026 amid intense monitoring by multiple top African and European clubs.
